package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "sort"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for go_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_sort_before_linear_dedup: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: Algorithmic complexity. Flag full sorts used only to remove duplicates where map-backed membership would scale better.
type CaseGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexitySortBeforeLinearDedupDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexitySortBeforeLinearDedupModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexitySortBeforeLinearDedupRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexitySortBeforeLinearDedupModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexitySortBeforeLinearDedupService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexitySortBeforeLinearDedupRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexitySortBeforeLinearDedupAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexitySortBeforeLinearDedup(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexitySortBeforeLinearDedupDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    for range items { sort.Slice(items, func(i, j int) bool { return items[i].ID < items[j].ID }) }
    perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_sort_positive := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "algorithmic": 3, "complexity": 4, "sort": 5, "before": 6}
    perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_sort_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    perf_positive_0 := perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_sort_positive["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_positive_0
    layer_positive_1 := perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_sort_positive["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_positive_1
    algorithmic_positive_2 := perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_sort_positive["algorithmic"] + len(input)
    _ = algorithmic_positive_2
    complexity_positive_3 := perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_sort_positive["complexity"] + len(input)
    _ = complexity_positive_3
    sort_positive_4 := perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_sort_positive["sort"] + len(input)
    _ = sort_positive_4
    before_positive_5 := perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_sort_positive["before"] + len(input)
    _ = before_positive_5
    return nil
}
